WORKER_URL.description: Module worker entrypoint used by the main-thread runtime.

SERVICE_WORKER_URL.description: Service worker entrypoint registered after the app reaches full readiness.

PROGRESSIVE_TRACE_RENDERER_URL.description: Deferred progressive trace renderer implementation module URL, relative to host/runtime.mjs.

BOOTSTRAP_MEMORY_INITIAL_PAGES.description: Initial WebAssembly memory pages allocated by the bootstrap module.

BOOTSTRAP_MEMORY_MAXIMUM_PAGES.description: Maximum WebAssembly memory pages allowed by the bootstrap module.

SERVICE_WORKER_READY_POLL_MS.description: Polling interval while waiting for the full app-ready performance mark before service-worker registration.

SERVICE_WORKER_READY_DELAY_MS.description: Delay before registering the service worker after the app reaches full readiness.

duplicateNumericValues.description: These are intentionally distinct timing boundaries: service-worker registration delay after full readiness and cold core interactivity budget.
Cold full-load readiness and the default renderer query time window are intentionally distinct budgets that happen to share a value.
Warm-load budget fields share the same target value, but each measures a separate browser/cache path boundary and may move independently.
Warm HTTP cache and warm service-worker paths both require no protected-path network transfer, while the renderer canvas-op end tag is a separate Wasm planner sentinel.
These renderer constants are intentionally distinct: viewport clamp span, Wasm query-range tag, planner terminator budget, and canvas stroke width.
Band padding and unknown-range stripe spacing are separate renderer layout values that happen to match today.
Hex color width and partial-slice hatch spacing are unrelated renderer values that happen to match today.
Lane height and incomplete-query stripe spacing are separate visual defaults and may move independently.
The ingest source-name pointer and source-name byte capacity are intentionally equal today but describe different parts of the scratch-memory layout.
The main-thread reader query cap and progressive renderer query cap both limit rows today, but they belong to separate call-site contracts.

DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME_PTR.description: Default memory pointer for host-written ingest source names; this is a scratch-memory address, not the source-name capacity.

DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME_MAX_BYTES.description: Maximum encoded byte length for host-written ingest source names; intentionally distinct from DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME_PTR even while both values are 4096.

DEFAULT_READER_NAME_PTR.description: Default memory pointer for main-thread reader index names; starts after the ingest-name scratch buffer.

DEFAULT_READER_CACHE_SLOTS.description: Default number of main-thread index reader cache slots.

DEFAULT_READER_QUERY_ROW_CAP.description: Default row cap for main-thread index reader queries.

DEFAULT_INGEST_PROGRESS_WINDOW_MS.description: Default worker ingest throughput sample window used for progress and ETA calculation.

DEFAULT_INGEST_ETA_STABLE_MS.description: Minimum worker ingest progress sample age before ETA is surfaced to avoid first-ramp flicker.

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_OUT_PTR.description: Default scratch pointer for index query result rows decoded by the progressive trace renderer.

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_WINDOW.description: Default minimum time span for one progressive trace renderer query tile.

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_ROW_CAP.description: Default maximum index query rows decoded from one progressive trace renderer query.

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_RANGE_BUDGET.description: Default maximum number of index query ranges the renderer may issue per draw.

DEFAULT_MIN_VIEWPORT_SPAN.description: Minimum visible time span after pan/zoom clamping.

DEFAULT_UNKNOWN_AFFORDANCE_WIDTH.description: Default width in CSS pixels for the unknown leading-edge progress affordance.

DEFAULT_UNKNOWN_STRIPE_SPACING.description: Default stripe spacing in CSS pixels for the unknown leading-edge progress affordance.

DEFAULT_INCOMPLETE_QUERY_STRIPE_SPACING.description: Default stripe spacing in CSS pixels for incomplete query affordances.

END_TAG.description: Wasm trace renderer planner sentinel tag indicating no more canvas operations.

QUERY_RANGE_TAG.description: Wasm trace renderer planner tag for an index query-range canvas operation.

INCOMPLETE_QUERY_RANGE_TAG.description: Wasm trace renderer planner tag for a visible incomplete query-range affordance.

TERMINATOR_OP_BUDGET.description: Extra planner iteration budget reserved for the required terminating canvas operation.

DEFAULT_CANVAS_WIDTH.description: Fallback canvas width used by the trace renderer when the browser has not reported dimensions.

DEFAULT_CANVAS_HEIGHT.description: Fallback canvas height used by the trace renderer when the browser has not reported dimensions.

DEFAULT_LANE_HEIGHT.description: Default slice lane height in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_LANE_GAP.description: Default vertical gap between slice lanes in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_TRACE_TOP.description: Default top offset for the first slice lane in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_BAND_PADDING.description: Default bottom padding for the rendered trace band in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_PARTIAL_HATCH_SPACING.description: Default hatch spacing in CSS pixels for partial slice affordances.

DEFAULT_STROKE_WIDTH.description: Default line width for trace renderer affordance strokes.

WHEEL_DELTA_MIN.description: Minimum wheel delta used by trace viewport zoom clamping.

WHEEL_DELTA_MAX.description: Maximum wheel delta used by trace viewport zoom clamping.

WHEEL_DELTA_SCALE.description: Scale factor applied to clamped wheel deltas before exponential zoom.

RGB_COLOR_MASK.description: Mask for converting packed slice colors to six-digit CSS RGB hex values.

RGB_HEX_WIDTH.description: Minimum hex digit count for packed slice colors rendered as CSS RGB values.
